base_query: ("randomised controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR RCT OR "control group" OR "randomly assigned" OR "field experiment" OR "clinical trial" OR "controlled study" OR randomisation OR "trial participants") AND (implemented OR "scale up" OR "decided to" OR introduced OR "rolled out" OR mandated OR rollout OR trialled OR pilot OR scrapped OR expanded OR evaluation)
